output.title: TikTok & Reel Hooks That Convert: Security Deposit Content Brief for Deposits-Back.com
output.meta_description: Your landlord kept your deposit? These viral TikTok hooks and short-form scripts help tenants fight back in 60 seconds. Start now.
content_outline: Hook 1: The Illegal Hold - Pattern interrupt with a state law deadline countdown
Hook 2: The Silent Landlord - Screen recordings of ignored texts and emails
Hook 3: The Math Does Not Math - Breaking down fake deposit deductions line by line
Hook 4: The Move-Out Receipts - Side-by-side photo reveals of alleged damage
Hook 5: The 60-Second Letter - Live demo of generating a demand letter on Deposits-Back.com
Script Templates: Ready-to-use 15 to 30 second problem-aware short-form scripts
Visual & Audio Pairing: Trending sounds, captions, and transitions that boost retention
Posting Strategy: Optimal times, hashtag clusters, and reply hooks for engagement
Conversion Sequence: Swipe-up and link-in-bio CTA flow to the $19.99 demand letter tool
key_points: Tenants in a problem-aware state respond highest to validation combined with immediate actionable hope
The first 3 seconds must reference a withheld security deposit or illegal deduction to stop the scroll
Deposits-Back.com removes all friction by delivering a legally sound demand letter for $19.99 with no sign-up or subscription
Frustration is the emotional driver; empowerment through legal documentation is the conversion driver
Every script must close with a single clear CTA: generate and send your demand letter in 60 seconds
output.cta: Do not let your landlord keep what is yours. Create your state-specific security deposit demand letter at Deposits-Back.com for just $19.99 — no sign-up, no subscription, and ready to send in 60 seconds.
output.target_audience: Problem-aware US renters whose landlords are wrongfully withholding or failing to return security deposits and who are actively seeking fast, affordable legal help on social media
